metadata.title: Steinheim | Premium German Bathroom Fixtures in Egypt
metadata.description: Discover Steinheim's premium bathroom mixers, shower systems, and accessories. German-engineered with Sedal cartridges and Neoperl aerators. Available in 6 finishes. Exclusive to Egypt through SIG.

hero.headline: Defined by what endures
hero.subline: Premium German bathroom systems — now in Egypt

hero.headline: Architectural precision. Timeless by nature.
hero.body: Luxury bathroom systems crafted in Germany. Four collections, six finishes, one architectural language.
hero.caption: Precision in every detail. Freedom in every choice.
hero.imageAlt: Steinheim wall-mounted mixer in an architectural bathroom

statement.headline: A bathroom is not a collection of objects. It is one complete language.
statement.body: Steinheim brings products, finishes, and technical choices into a coordinated system—giving homeowners, designers, and project teams a clearer way to create spaces that feel intentional from every angle.

collections.headline: Four distinct ways to shape a room.
collections.body: From soft curves to decisive geometry, each collection carries one design idea across the products that complete a bathroom.

engineering.headline: Considered from the inside out.
engineering.body: A beautiful surface is only the beginning. Steinheim pairs its design language with specified components, coordinated product families, and practical technical information for confident residential and project decisions.
engineering.caption: Shower column · Matte Black
engineering.imageAlt: Steinheim shower column in a warm architectural shower space

finishes.headline: Surface changes everything.
finishes.body: Six finish families let the same design move from quiet and reflective to warm, graphic, or deeply architectural.
finishes.availability: Each Steinheim finish transforms the same form into a different character — from quiet chrome to dramatic matte black.

product.body: A floor-mounted bath mixer with a complete hand-shower set, available across the Joy finish palette.

assembly.body: A Steinheim bathroom is built from coordinated collections, verified model references, finish rules, and technical details that project teams can trust.

foundation.label: Collection
foundation.detail: Four Egypt collections with distinct design languages.

structure.label: Components
structure.detail: Published technical data lists 35mm Sedal cartridges and Neoperl aerators where specified.

control.label: Installation
control.detail: Common mixer specifications support standard Egyptian project planning.

flow.label: Finishes
flow.detail: Availability is verified by exact product and collection, not assumed globally.

complete.label: Proposal
complete.detail: Every visible choice can become a structured trade schedule.

precision.headline: Precision you can feel.
precision.body: Every Steinheim fixture is built around components that outlast trends — Sedal cartridges, Neoperl aerators, and PVD surfaces engineered for decades of daily use.

finishMorph.headline: Endless expression. Unified design language.
finishMorph.body: Each Steinheim finish transforms the same form into a different character — from quiet chrome to dramatic matte black, warm brushed gold to deep coffee gold.

trade.headline: From inspiration to a buildable proposal.
trade.body: Explore the catalogue, ask the AI advisor, assemble exact products and quantities, then create one structured brief for the Steinheim trade team.

discover.title: Discover
discover.body: Move through collections, products, finishes, and project imagery at your own pace—or let the AI guide the route.

specify.title: Specify
specify.body: Choose exact finishes, model references, and quantities while keeping the project schedule in one place.

propose.title: Propose
propose.body: Generate a clean RFQ document for commercial pricing, stock, lead-time, and project-team review.

joy.name: Joy
joy.description: Round, refined forms for contemporary bathrooms

quatro.name: Quatro
quatro.description: Geometric lines for bold design statements

featureStrip.line: German engineering. European precision. Available in 6 finishes.

chrome.name: Chrome
chrome.description: A timeless mirror finish that reflects light and complements any bathroom palette. The most versatile choice for both classic and modern interiors.

brushedNickel.name: Brushed Nickel
brushedNickel.description: A soft satin finish with understated warmth. Resists fingerprints and water spots, making it ideal for high-traffic bathrooms.

matteBlack.name: Matte Black
matteBlack.description: A bold, light-absorbing surface that creates dramatic contrast. The defining fixture finish of contemporary design.

brushedGold.name: Brushed Gold
brushedGold.description: A warm rose-gold tone achieved through PVD coating. Fingerprint-resistant. Ideal for contemporary spaces with warm material palettes.

coffeeGold.name: Coffee Gold
coffeeGold.description: A deep, burnished gold with brown undertones. PVD-coated for durability. Pairs beautifully with dark stone and timber.

metalGun.name: Metal Gun
metalGun.description: A dark gunmetal grey with industrial character. PVD-coated for lasting performance. Suits minimalist and industrial-inspired spaces.

sedal.title: Sedal cartridges
sedal.description: Spanish-engineered ceramic cartridges with lifetime warranty. Smooth, precise control.

neoperl.title: Neoperl aerators
neoperl.description: Swiss-made aerators delivering splash-free, perfectly aerated water flow.

pvd.title: PVD finishes
pvd.description: Physical Vapor Deposition creates hard, durable, hypoallergenic surfaces.

trade.description: Steinheim's trade programme offers project pricing, sample units, specification sheets, and dedicated support for architects, interior designers, and developers across Egypt.

pricing.title: Project pricing
pricing.description: Competitive volume-based pricing for trade projects

samples.title: Sample units
samples.description: Physical samples for client presentations and mood boards

specs.title: Spec sheets
specs.description: Complete technical documentation and CAD files

support.title: Dedicated support
support.description: Direct line to our trade team for project consultation

about.narrative: At Steinheim, finishes are an essential design element, carefully developed to enhance both form and function. Every product reflects a philosophy where German precision engineering meets thoughtful, enduring design.
about.partnership: Exclusively distributed in Egypt by El Sharbatly International Group

warranty.title: Warranty
warranty.pvdFinishes: PVD finishes (Matte Black, Metal Gun, Brushed Gold, Coffee Gold)
warranty.validInEgypt: Valid in Egypt only. Covers manufacturing defects, not misuse.

footer.distributor: Exclusive distributor: El Sharbatly International Group
